description: Convert between binary data and ASCII-encoded representations. Contains functions to convert between binary and various ASCII-encoded binary formats including hex, base64, and quoted-printable.

functions.name: hexlify

returns.description: Hexadecimal string representation (two hex digits per byte, lowercase)

functions.description: Return the hexadecimal representation of the binary data. Every byte is converted into the corresponding two-digit hex representation. The result is a string twice as long as the input.

functions.name: unhexlify

params.name: hexstr
params.description: Hexadecimal string to convert (must have an even number of hex digits)

functions.description: Return the binary data represented by the hexadecimal string. The input must contain an even number of hex digits (0-9, a-f, A-F). Raises TypeError on non-hexadecimal characters.

functions.name: b2a_hex
functions.description: Return the hexadecimal representation of the binary data. Alias for hexlify().

functions.name: a2b_hex
functions.description: Return the binary data represented by the hexadecimal string. Alias for unhexlify().

functions.name: b2a_base64

returns.description: Base64 encoded string, including a trailing newline character

functions.description: Convert binary data to a line of base64-encoded ASCII characters. The return value includes a trailing newline character.

functions.name: a2b_base64

params.name: string
params.description: Base64 encoded ASCII string to decode

functions.description: Convert a block of base64-encoded data back to binary. More than one line of base64 data can be passed at a time. Ignores whitespace and invalid characters.

functions.name: b2a_qp

params.name: quotetabs
params.description: If True, encode embedded tabs and spaces. If False (default), leave them unquoted.

params.name: istext
params.description: If True (default), encode newlines according to text rules. If False, encode all newlines.

params.name: header
params.description: If True, encode spaces as underscores per RFC 2045 header encoding rules

functions.description: Convert binary data to quoted-printable encoding. Lines are limited to 76 characters with soft line breaks inserted as needed.

functions.name: a2b_qp

params.name: header
params.description: If True, decode underscores as spaces per RFC 2045 header encoding rules

functions.description: Convert a block of quoted-printable data back to binary data.

functions.name: crc_hqx

params.name: data
params.description: Binary data to compute CRC over

params.name: crc
params.description: Initial CRC value (pass 0 for the first call, or the return value of a previous call to continue)

functions.description: Compute a 16-bit CRC value of data, starting with an initial CRC of crc. Uses the CRC-CCITT polynomial x^16 + x^12 + x^5 + 1 (0x1021). Used in the binhex4 format.

functions.name: crc32

params.name: data
params.description: Binary data to compute CRC over

params.name: crc
params.description: Initial CRC value. Default is 0. Pass the return value of a previous call to continue computing over multiple chunks.

returns.description: CRC-32 value as a signed 32-bit integer

functions.description: Compute CRC-32 checksum of data. The result is a signed 32-bit integer. To get an unsigned result, use: crc32(data) & 0xffffffff. Note: on Python 2.7, the return value may be a signed integer.

functions.name: rlecode_hqx
functions.description: Perform binhex4 style run-length encoding on data. Consecutive repeated bytes are replaced by the byte value, a repeat marker (0x90), and a count byte.

functions.name: rledecode_hqx
functions.description: Perform binhex4 style run-length decoding on data. Raises Incomplete if the data ends with an orphaned repeat marker.

classes.name: Error
classes.description: Exception raised on errors in binascii functions. Subclass of ValueError.

classes.name: Incomplete
classes.description: Exception raised when incomplete data is encountered. Raised when rledecode_hqx encounters data that is not complete. Subclass of Exception.
